anti_claim: This Batch-9 capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies plus source-faithful public exercises. It does not claim live lineage truth, human approval authority, real news truth, host-state truth, Work Ledger truth, provider dispatch, source mutation authority, publication authority, or release approval.

allowed_public_inputs: public mechanism ids and source-module ids
public negative-case ids and stable error codes
exact copied non-secret macro source modules
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
bounded synthetic exercise inputs and outcomes

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe composite organ that imports Batch-9 macro engines as exact copied macro source bodies plus source-faithful public exercises.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun representative backend, governance, projection, and TypeScript data-shaping mechanics without inheriting live private authority.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Receipt-only claims, fixture-only authority, provider dispatch, live authority over approvals or work ledgers, market advice, or release signaling.
failure_modes: mechanism count drifts from the thirteen Batch-9 tier targets
source module count drifts from thirteen without manifest and test updates
copied source module digest does not match macro source digest
copied source module lacks required anchors
runtime exercises stop checking the named engine semantics and become receipt-only checks
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, provider/browser state, credentials, live market data, or private runtime state

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly thirteen Batch-9 mechanism rows
require exactly thirteen copied macro source modules
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for every copied source module
execute source-faithful public exercises for all thirteen mechanisms
require stable negative-case codes for all thirteen mechanisms
keep provider dispatch, host-state truth, live doctrine truth, real news truth, Work Ledger authority, source mutation, publication, and release authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 9 macro engines capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 9 macro engines capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch9_macro_engines_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-9 capsule accepts exact copied non-secret macro source bodies plus source-faithful public exercises. It does not claim live lineage truth, human approval authority, real news truth, host-state truth, Work Ledger truth, provider dispatch, source mutation authority, publication authority, or release approval.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, public_private_boundary, and anti-claim floor.
